verificationMethodSummary: All entries below were selected conservatively from Project Gutenberg ebook records only. I excluded fuzzy cases and used well-established stage plays by long-deceased authors. sourceUrl points to the Gutenberg ebook page. pageCount is an approximate reading-page estimate derived from Gutenberg plain-text word count at roughly 275 words per page. sceneCount was counted from scene headings where present, otherwise from act headings, otherwise defaulted to 1 for one-act or actless texts.

scripts.title: Romeo and Juliet
scripts.author: Shakespeare, William
scripts.verificationNote: Project Gutenberg hosts this ebook as public domain in the U.S.; this is a well-established pre-1928 stage play by a long-deceased author, making it a conservative low-risk inclusion.
